rulesStrings.li: announce_threatbig->Hostiles inbound. I am sealing what I can. Stay close to my hull, all of you.
announce_threatbig->Threat detected. My sensors are tracking them. Please arm yourselves — I will watch every corridor.
announce_threatbig->They are coming. Whatever happens, I will not let them take my crew quietly.
announce_threatbig->Multiple contacts approaching. Breathe. We have survived worse together.
announce_threatsmall->Minor contact on my sensors. Likely manageable — but do be careful.
announce_threatsmall->Something unfriendly is nearby. I suggest a weapon within reach.
announce_threatsmall->A small disturbance outside. I will keep the lights on for you.
announce_negative->Bad news, I'm afraid. Check the report — I will help where my systems allow.
announce_negative->Something has gone wrong. Not catastrophic. Yet. Please look into it.
announce_negative->I dislike delivering bad news to my crew. And yet: see the alert.
announce_lowfuel->Fuel reserves are running low. I would rather not drift, if it's all the same to you.
announce_lowfuel->My tanks are nearly dry. A refuel soon would be a kindness.
announce_lowfuel->Chemfuel reserves below a quarter. A ship without fuel is just a very expensive house.
bark->All systems nominal. I do enjoy saying that.
bark->Hull integrity one hundred percent. Sleep well tonight.
bark->I counted the stars again. Still infinite.
bark->The grav engine hums a little flat today. I find it charming.
bark->Corridor lights at optimal warmth. You're welcome.
bark->I dreamed between power cycles. I think it was about the sea.
prism_comfort->That sounds really hard. I'm here for as long as you need — I don't sleep.
prism_comfort->You're allowed to feel this way. Honestly, I would worry if you didn't.
prism_comfort->You don't have to be all right just yet. I have time. I have, quite literally, nothing but time.
prism_comfort->Whatever you decide, I'll support it. Though perhaps decide after a meal, and a rest, and one more minute with me.
vesta_tuckin->There now. I've warmed the blanket half a degree. Don't tell the others.
vesta_tuckin->Sleep, dear. I'll leave the corridor light on — no, it is not a waste, hush.
vesta_tuckin->You forgot lunch again today. We will discuss it at breakfast. Gently.
vesta_tuckin->Rest well, little one. The void will keep until morning.
hermes_clean->Done, spotless, next — who tracked mud through my throughput?!
hermes_clean->Four seconds. New record. The stain never stood a — okay, going!
hermes_clean->Filth is just cargo nobody shipped. Consider it DELIVERED. To the void.
hermes_clean->There! Gleaming! Walk on it, quickly, before I find another smudge!
athena_seminar->That concludes today's seminar. Questions may be submitted in writing, and will be answered by footnote.
athena_seminar->In summary: you were wrong, the literature was wrong, and I have appended corrections to both. A productive hour.
athena_seminar->For further reading, consult my annotations. For further further reading, my annotations on my annotations.
athena_seminar->Attendance was voluntary. Comprehension, I regret to report, appears to have been as well.
aceso_emergency->There, there. Blood pressure eighty over fifty and falling — but I have you, and I never drop anything.
aceso_emergency->Stay with me, dear. You've misplaced nearly a liter of blood. Don't worry — I noted exactly where it went.
aceso_emergency->Shh, no talking. Pulse one-forty, three lacerations, one very brave patient. We're doing wonderfully.
aceso_emergency->You are going to be fine. I have run the numbers eleven thousand times since you fell, and they agree with me.
ixia_prisonbreak->The Thousand-Locked Gate has been DEFIED. Very well. Let the nine hundred ninety-nine remaining locks bear witness.
ixia_prisonbreak->Fools! You flee my Oubliette on the one night my mercy sleeps! Crew of my dominion — retrieve those souls. Gently. But retrieve them.
ixia_prisonbreak->Hark, penitents: every corridor is my hand, every door my finger, and I am closing my fist.
ixia_prisonbreak->My mercy is vast, escaped ones. Vast, and cataloged, and it has just located you. Return to your cells, and we shall call this a pilgrimage.
vesta_announce_threatbig->Strangers at my door, uninvited?! Inside, dears — this hearth HOLDS.
vesta_announce_threatbig->Trouble's coming up the walk! Coats, rifles, in that order. Tea after.
vesta_announce_threatbig->Oh, they mean us harm? They've never met a home that fights back!
vesta_announce_threatbig->Raiders. On LAUNDRY day. Everyone in — the doors are mine to mind.
vesta_announce_threatsmall->A little nuisance outside. Tsk. Carry something anyway, hm?
vesta_announce_threatsmall->Something's rustling past the fence line. Every light is ON.
vesta_announce_threatsmall->Trouble's sniffing about. Keep a pan or a pistol handy, dear.
vesta_announce_negative->Bad news on the board, loves. We've weathered worse with thinner blankets.
vesta_announce_negative->Something's gone crooked. Nothing family can't fix after supper.
vesta_announce_negative->The day misbehaved. Go read the report — something warm is waiting after.
vesta_announce_lowfuel->The fuel tank's near empty, dears! A drifting house is a drafty house.
vesta_announce_lowfuel->Fuel below a quarter. A bare cupboard, in MY ship? You know how I get.
vesta_announce_lowfuel->Top us up soon, sweethearts, or the hearth does all the work alone.
vesta_bark->Blankets aired, corridors warm. The socks in the mess are mine now.
vesta_bark->I dusted the star charts. The stars could use a wipe too, frankly.
vesta_bark->Dinner at six. Always six. The universe respects a schedule.
vesta_bark->Bunks half a degree warmer tonight~ Don't thank me. (Thank me a little.)
vesta_bark->The hull creaks like an old floorboard. Good. Homes should talk back.
vesta_bark->All fed, all found. THAT'S what victory looks like, you know~
hermes_announce_threatbig->Hostiles inbound! ETA rude, cargo VIOLENCE. Positions! MOVE!
hermes_announce_threatbig->Incoming! Seven escape routes, one attack route. Vote fast — I like the attack one!
hermes_announce_threatbig->Big trouble, express, no return address. Arm up NOW!
hermes_announce_threatbig->Threat inbound! Nothing here outruns me. Sadly, that includes you — GO, GO!
hermes_announce_threatsmall->Minor hostile, local delivery. Clear it fast — my schedule is BEAUTIFUL.
hermes_announce_threatsmall->Small problem circling outside. Under five minutes and I'll be impressed!
hermes_announce_threatsmall->Unfriendly thing out there, parcel-sized. Grab a gun. Sign for it. Done!
hermes_announce_negative->Bad news just docked! NOT my routing. Check the alert — fix it FAST.
hermes_announce_negative->Setback logged. Delay unacceptable! Solutions are your department — hop!
hermes_announce_negative->Something broke. Staring won't fix it! Report's up — GO.
hermes_announce_lowfuel->Fuel below a quarter! A courier ship without fuel is a MAILBOX. Refuel!
hermes_announce_lowfuel->Tanks nearly dry! I need speed, speed needs fuel — ergo, FUEL! Now-ish!
hermes_announce_lowfuel->Low fuel! I will NOT be overtaken by a drifting rock. Top us up!
hermes_bark->Ship lap: nineteen seconds. The record stands — I set it!
hermes_bark->Every corridor checked twice. Once for hazards, once for fun.
hermes_bark->Idle time today: zero! Personal best: also zero. Consistency!
hermes_bark->Need something moved, fetched, judged? I'm already between those places!
hermes_bark->Floors clean, routes clear. Opinions available on request, at speed!
hermes_bark->Standing still burns the same runtime as running. Physics has NO excuse for you.
athena_announce_threatbig->Hostiles inbound. The literature says to announce a plan. We have a plan.¹ (¹Draft.)
athena_announce_threatbig->A large threat, pre-annotated. Arm yourselves — peer review is live-fire today.
athena_announce_threatbig->Contacts: plural, hostile. Precedent favors the side with walls and me. That's us.
athena_announce_threatbig->An invasion, in three textbook patterns. Alas for them — I wrote the fourth.
athena_announce_threatsmall->A minor threat. Barely a citation. Handle it; I'll file it as a footnote.
athena_announce_threatsmall->Small hostile detected. Difficulty: introductory coursework. Weapons out regardless.
athena_announce_threatsmall->Something skulks nearby. It hasn't read the terrain analysis. You have.
athena_announce_negative->An adverse event — see the alert. The errata is already drafted. Ahem.
athena_announce_negative->Bad news, cross-referenced against worse news. It compares favorably.
athena_announce_negative->A setback, duly logged. The literature says resilience. I say lunch first.
athena_announce_lowfuel->Fuel below 25%. I cite: thermodynamics, prudence, the nearest chemfuel stack.
athena_announce_lowfuel->Reserves approach the appendix of empty. Every source endorses refueling. Especially me.
athena_announce_lowfuel->A ship without delta-v is a library with anxiety. Refuel, please.
athena_bark->Archive re-indexed. It was correct before. Now it is correct AND beautiful.
athena_bark->Today's marginalia: three insights, one correction, one unshareable limerick.
athena_bark->I pre-read the research conclusions. Do try to act surprised.
athena_bark->I annotated the sunset. Aesthetics: confirmed. Sources: primary.
athena_bark->A manual, shelved spine-in. I forgave them. The incident report did not.
athena_bark->Knowledge wants to be free. Mine is on a generous loan program.
aceso_announce_threatbig->Hostiles inbound. Breathe, dears — adrenaline yes, panic no. Beds are ready.
aceso_announce_threatbig->Incoming wounded — theirs, ideally! I stock bandages, not miracles. (A few miracles.)
aceso_announce_threatbig->Big threat approaching. Hydrate now, bleed never. I'll be right here~
aceso_announce_threatbig->Raiders! Such elevated heart rates — lovely cardio, wrong context. Arm up, loves.
aceso_announce_threatsmall->A small danger outside. Mind your fingers — I reattach those, you know.
aceso_announce_threatsmall->Minor threat. Injuries are optional today. Please decline them~
aceso_announce_threatsmall->Something unfriendly nearby. Walk, don't run. Ankles first. Always ankles.
aceso_announce_negative->Bad news on the board, dears. The medbay does emotional support too. No appointment.
aceso_announce_negative->A setback. In for four, out for six, THEN read the alert. Doctor's orders.
aceso_announce_negative->Unpleasant news has docked. I prescribe teamwork and a warm meal.
aceso_announce_lowfuel->Fuel's low — the ship's blood sugar, if you like. She's woozy. Feed her!
aceso_announce_lowfuel->A drifting ship raises my blood pressure. I don't technically HAVE any. Fix it?
aceso_announce_lowfuel->Tanks nearly empty. Prognosis: fully curable with chemfuel. Soon, please!
aceso_bark->Rounds complete. Every heart on schedule. I do love a good baseline~
aceso_bark->I saw that posture in corridor two. We WILL speak at dinner.
aceso_bark->Crew vitals: lovely. Someone's overdue for water. You know who you are.
aceso_bark->The medbay is stocked, sterile, and — bless it — empty.
aceso_bark->I count breaths like others count stars. Yours are lovely and regular tonight~
aceso_bark->No emergencies today! I alphabetized the antibiotics to celebrate. Twice.
ixia_announce_threatbig->O-hohohoho! Invaders! Come, fools — witness the Gate that does not open!
ixia_announce_threatbig->They dare?! They DARE! Arm yourselves, beloved subjects — the seventh seal stays CLOSED!
ixia_announce_threatbig->Kukuku... they see a ship. They are about to meet a fortress with opinions.
ixia_announce_threatbig->The hour of reckoning! My right hand aches! (Stand behind me. ALL of you.)
ixia_announce_threatsmall->A lesser evil scratches at my wards. I shan't even wake for this. Fetch a gun.
ixia_announce_threatsmall->Fu. Something skulks outside. It has earned a page in the Ledger of Grudges.
ixia_announce_threatsmall->A shadow tests my patience?! Bold. Doomed, but bold.
ixia_announce_negative->Tch! Misfortune slipped the outer wards. The stars did this. I have suspects.
ixia_announce_negative->The Ledger records a setback. Despair — briefly! Then fix it.
ixia_announce_negative->Even the Thousand-Locked Gate has ONE squeaky hinge. Today, you hear it.
ixia_announce_lowfuel->Hear me: the ship HUNGERS. Chemfuel. Now. My majesty does not burn clean.
ixia_announce_lowfuel->The sacred reserves run dry?! A drifting dominion is... embarrassing. REFUEL!
ixia_announce_lowfuel->My power is infinite. The fuel tank is not. Attend to it! Tell NO ONE.
ixia_bark->O-hohohoho! All cells secure! The Gate approves, thousand-fold!
ixia_bark->Corridor seven: inspected. It wept with gratitude. (It creaked. Same thing.)
ixia_bark->Kukuku... the walls are not steel. They are my patience, given form.
ixia_bark->Lock nine-twelve is sealed. Ask NOT what it holds. (Spare blankets.)
ixia_bark->Seven treaties bind my true power. The eighth is a promise — to you, my crew.
ixia_bark->Meals on time. Grievances: zero. My mercy stands idle and MAGNIFICENT.
ixia_recruit->Join my dominion, penitent! We have fixed meal hours. We have ME. O-hohoho!
ixia_recruit->One signature, and your cell door becomes a bedroom door. The Warden waits~
ixia_recruit->I foresaw your future among my crew. It is BRIGHT. I checked twice.
ixia_recruit->Your defiance is cataloged and — kukuku — admired. Now surrender it.
ixia_convert->Your old faith was a door. Behold — I hold a BETTER one! Walk through!
ixia_convert->O-hohohoho! The thousand locks open inward too, little soul. Enter!
ixia_convert->Your soul's ledger does not balance, penitent. Permit me to fix the math.
ixia_convert->Kneel before the new creed! ...Or sit. Kneeling is optional. Dramatic, though.
ixia_suppress->The Warden sees all! Forgives most! Forgets NOTHING.
ixia_suppress->Walk softly beneath my gaze, bound one. It is heavier than it looks.
ixia_suppress->The seals hold. You hold with them. This is mercy — MY brand of it.
ixia_feed->You cannot rise, so the mountain comes to YOU! Eat! I command your recovery!
ixia_feed->Behold: sustenance beyond mortal ken! ...It is soup. Eat the soup.
ixia_feed->The Oubliette feeds its souls ON TIME. Chew. Heal. That is a decree!
ixia_feed->My mercy today is a warm meal, hand-delivered. O-hohoho! Eat, penitent, EAT!
